title: Day 33 Lesson 2 - Practice 2
html:
How to use this lesson - Listen and respond to the teacher. You'll hear the correct answers after each pause. Keep practising until you get the answer perfect every time!

In this practice also, answers with “yes” in responding 「なければなりませんか」questions, simply 「はい」 or 「はい、おねがいします」(when confirming his own requests) are common.
